# cmccloudv2_mongo_configuration (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database_mode` (String) The database mode of the Mongo configuration, `Master/Slave`, `Cluster`, `Standalone`
- `database_version` (String) The database version of the Mongo configuration. Example `6.0`
- `name` (String) The name of the Mongo configuration
- `parameters` (Map of String) List of the parameters for the Mongo configuration

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Mongo configuration
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
